nasb.text: And he said to Jehoshaphat, “Will you go with me to battle at Ramoth-gilead?” And Jehoshaphat said to the king of Israel, “I am as you are, my people as your people, my horses as your horses.”

esv.text: And he said to Jehoshaphat, “Will you go with me to battle at Ramoth-gilead?” And Jehoshaphat said to the king of Israel, “I am as you are, my people as your people, my horses as your horses.”

cnv.text: 亞哈問約沙法：“你肯與我一起到基列的拉末去作戰嗎？”約沙法回答以色列王：“你我不分彼此，我的人民就像是你的人民，我的戰馬就像是你的戰馬。”

ccb.text: 他问约沙法：“你愿意跟我一起去攻打基列的拉末吗？”约沙法回答说：“你我不分彼此，我的民就是你的民，我的马就是你的马。”
